experience.title: Information Technology Auditor
experience.description: Participate in the annual risk assessment and audit planning process covering IT, financial, operational, and contract areas. Assist with IT audits and reviews including user access, database and service configurations, security, and policy and procedural compliance.

experience.title: PeopleSoft Security Administrator III
experience.description: Work closely with the internal and external audit department to provide reports and documentation for compliance. Perform user access recertification, operational audits, quarterly performance assessments for Segregation of Duty /SOX controls by compiling and distributing monthly and quarterly user access reports.

experience.title: Sr. Application Systems Analyst
experience.description: Worked with business owner to gather and document business requirements and business processes. Created and configured Work centers, Dashboards, and Interaction Hubs for HCM,and Financials using PeopleSoft 9.2 PeopleTools framework.

experience.title: Sr. ERP Security Analyst/Team Lead/Project Lead
experience.description: As a team lead, was responsible for implementation, troubleshooting, cybersecurity assessments, PeopleSoft user security reviews and security support, user system access review, and upgrades for PeopleSoft HRMS, PeopleSoft Financial systems, and Workday HCM.

experience.title: Manager
experience.description: Managed and assisted in development of major incident management procedures to be followed by IT staff in resolving network related issues.

experience.title: Lead Client Security Analyst
experience.description: Served as the liaison between the business and IT departments supporting global accounts for companies located all over the world.

experience.title: Sr. Technical Analyst
experience.description: Coordinated with analysts/programmers to evaluate, modify, test, debug, and maintain applications.

extra_fields.certifications: Certified Information Systems Auditor (CISA) Certification, Legacy MCSE, CCNA, and Novell certified
